executives.name: Brad Greve
executives.background: Brad joined the Company in 2019 and was appointed Group Finance Director in 2020. He has extensive experience in the oil and gas industry, having held senior roles at Schlumberger.

executives.name: Claudia Jaramillo
executives.background: Ms. Jaramillo has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since August 2023. She joined Jacobs in 2022 as Executive Vice President, Strategy and Corporate Development. Prior to Jacobs, she spent over 20 years at Schlumberger in various senior financial and operational leadership roles.

executives.name: Indra Nooyi
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of PepsiCo, Inc.

executives.name: Jamie Gorelick
executives.background: Partner at Wilmer Cutler Pickering Hale and Dorr LLP and former Deputy Attorney General of the United States.

executives.name: Karin Hoeing
executives.background: Karin joined BAE Systems in 2018 as Group Human Resources Director. She previously worked at Schlumberger for over 20 years in various international roles.
